description.value:
Crusader

The Crusader is a warrior of faith and steel, a holy soldier who charges into the enemies of the God-Emperor with zealous fury. Whether they wield a crackling power sword or a humble war hammer, the Crusader lives for the clash of melee combat, trusting in the Emperor's protection and their own martial prowess. They are the warband's shield and spear — unyielding in defence, devastating in the charge.

Role Aptitudes

Knowledge, Offence, Strength, Toughness, Weapon Skill

Role Talent

Hatred (any one) or Resistance (Fear)

Role Bonus

Knight of the God-Emperor: When making a Charge action, gain +20 to WS instead of the normal +10.

specialAbilities.name: Knight of the God-Emperor
specialAbilities.description: When making a Charge action, gain +20 to WS instead of the normal +10.
